subject: [PATCH v3 06/10] nfsd: revoke copy-notify stateids before dropping their reference

2026-07-10.patch_summary: This patch fixes a use-after-free bug in the NFSv4 copy-notify stateid handling by introducing a new function `revoke_cpntf_state_locked()` that unhashes an entry from the IDR and its parent's list before dropping its reference. This ensures that the entry is not freed while still being held by another process, preventing a KASAN-detectable use-after-free error. The patch also updates the revoke paths to use this new function and fixes issues in the parent-stid drain, OFFLOAD_CANCEL, and laundromat expiry processes.
